description.ko: 단단한 흑요석 단일체가 완벽하게 균형 잡힌 디지털 소용돌이로 산산조각 나는 수리적 혼돈을 날카롭고 고대비로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A sharp, high-contrast exploration of mathematical chaos where a solid obsidian monolith shatters into a perfectly balanced digital vortex.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian monolith by KURO-X, titled 'Recursive Geometric Entropy.' The structure is in a state of high-velocity mathematical deconstruction, shattering into a calculated vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. Set against a clinical #FFFFFF digital void, the composition features intentional pixel-sorting artifacts, heavy digital scanlines, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration. High-contrast cinematic lighting with ray-traced reflections on shifting planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the precise moment of chaotic order.
